tokenButton_tooltip_required: The adapter cannot reach Plex with the current token. Click to retrieve a new one.
tokenButton_tooltip_renew: Token works. Click only if you want to replace it.
tokenDialog_step2: 2. Open plex.tv/link, log in if needed and enter the PIN:
tokenDialog_step3: 3. After Plex confirms the link, take over the token:
tokenDialog_applied: Token applied — don't forget to save the configuration
tokenDialog_unchanged: Token unchanged — Plex returned the same token, no save needed
tokenDialog_popupBlocked: Popup blocked — please use the link next to the button
tokenDialog_status_gotPin: PIN ready. Enter it at plex.tv/link.
tokenDialog_status_waiting: Waiting for Plex to confirm the link…
tokenDialog_status_success: New token retrieved and written to the form.
tokenDialog_status_success_unchanged: Token confirmed — identical to the one already saved.
tokenDialog_status_error_pin: Could not fetch PIN. Is the adapter running?
tokenDialog_status_error_token: Could not retrieve token. Did you enter the PIN at plex.tv/link?
cleanup_hint: Players older than the threshold are pre-marked. Click a card to flip its state. Cleanup deletes only red cards.
cleanup_error_load: Could not load players. Is the adapter running?
cleanup_error_delete: Cleanup failed — see adapter log for details.
